name: Trailers4Jellyfin
description: Automatically downloads trailers for upcoming and recently released movies not in your library, from TMDB/YouTube. Pairs with Cinema Mode for a real cinema experience.
overview: Cinema-style trailers for movies you haven't seen yet

versions.changelog: - {'Add language filter': 'choose which trailer languages to download via checkboxes (English, Spanish, French, German, and 16 more)'}
- {'Add trailer rotation': 'delete watched trailers and enforce a max-trailers-on-disk cap, both run at the start of each download task'}
- {'Fix': 'rename downloads from -trailer.mp4 to .mp4 — Jellyfin treats -trailer suffix as local trailer attachments, making them invisible in a Movies library scan'}

- Force IPv4 for all HTTP calls (TMDB + YouTube) to eliminate ~80s IPv6 timeout
- Support both JWT Read Access Token (Bearer) and v3 API Key (?api_key=) for TMDB

- Force IPv4 for TMDB API calls to avoid ~80s IPv6 timeout on systems where IPv6 is unreachable
- Support both JWT Read Access Token (Bearer) and v3 API Key (?api_key=) automatically
- {'Fix TMDB auth': 'use Authorization Bearer header instead of api_key query param (required for Read Access Token)'}

- Fix release zip always including plugin DLL (v1.0.1.0 zip was accidentally missing it)
- Settings page now works after a Jellyfin server restart

- Fix plugin loading by bundling YoutubeExplode dependencies in release zip
- Add plugin logo

- Initial release
- Fetches trailers from TMDB Now Playing, Upcoming, Popular, and Top Rated
- Configurable date range (3 months to all time)
- Built-in 720p downloader with optional yt-dlp for 1080p
- Skips movies already in your Jellyfin library
